forgot_not_found.action: Check your email or contact support
forgot_not_found.message: No license was found for this email address.
forgot_not_found.title: No License Found

forgot_rate_limit.message: Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
forgot_rate_limit.title: Too Many Requests

forgot_success.message: Your license key has been sent to your email address.
forgot_success.title: Email Sent

email_mismatch.message: This license key is registered to a different email address.
email_mismatch.title: Email Mismatch

license_expired.message: Your license has expired. Please renew to continue.
license_expired.title: License Expired

login_invalid.message: The email or license key you entered is incorrect.
login_invalid.title: Invalid Credentials

circuit_open.message:
The app has stopped trying to connect after multiple failures.

This protects both your computer and the server.
circuit_open.title: 🔌 Connection Failed

maintenance.message:
The server is currently under maintenance.

This usually takes only a few minutes.
maintenance.title: 🔧 Maintenance Mode

offline.action: Check internet connection and try again
offline.message:
Cannot connect to the license server.

Possible reasons:
• Server maintenance
• Your internet connection is down
• Temporary server overload
• Firewall blocking connection
offline.title: ❌ Server Offline

overloaded.message:
The server is handling many requests right now.

Please wait a moment and try again.
overloaded.title: 🚦 Server Busy

slow.message:
Your request may take longer than usual.

Please be patient.
slow.title: ⚠️ Slow Connection

timeout.message:
The server is not responding.

This may be temporary. Please check:
• Your internet connection
• Firewall settings
timeout.title: ⏱️ Connection Timeout

unknown.action: Please contact support if this persists
unknown.title: ⚠️ Unknown Error

trial_already_used_email.message: You have used your free trial with this email address.
trial_already_used_email.title: Trial Already Used

trial_already_used_hardware.message: This device has been used for a free trial.
trial_already_used_hardware.title: Trial Already Used

trial_no_internet.message:
An internet connection is required to activate a trial.

Please check your connection and try again.
trial_no_internet.title: No Internet Connection

trial_not_eligible.message: You are not eligible for a trial at this time.
trial_not_eligible.title: Not Eligible

trial_success.message: Your trial license has been activated successfully!
trial_success.title: Trial Activated
